title: Investigation orchestrator (preflight, gating, grouping, adjudication, report)
user_visible_behavior: investigate_address(request) returns a full OccupancyAgentAssessment for an address.
verification: bun run verify; deterministic E2E in test/e2e drives the real orchestrator with fixtures.
evidence: Byte-identical deterministic parity vs Python on '1104 SPRING RUN RD'; typecheck+tests green; E2E-1/E2E-2 pass.

title: Atomic heuristics gating + evaluation + synthesis
user_visible_behavior: Deterministic packet gating and evidence evaluation over address evidence.
evidence: Parity verification vs Python heuristics; typecheck+tests green.

title: cli/run_address.ts single-address runner

verification: Live run against the Python GraphQL server on :8000.
evidence: Deterministic-parity live run vs Python on '1104 SPRING RUN RD'.
notes: Needs the Python server; not in the offline verify loop.

title: Development harness (instruction/state/feature/feedback/bootstrap)
user_visible_behavior: AGENTS.md rules, PROGRESS.md continuity, feature list, init.sh, and a deterministic E2E suite.
verification: bun run verify green; ./init.sh clean; E2E-1 + E2E-2 pass with no network/API.
evidence: bun run verify green (19 pass, 0 fail); env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY bun test test/e2e passes (2 pass, no key); ./init.sh clean.
notes: This plan. Set to passing only when E2E-1/E2E-2 pass and verify is green.

title: External evidence wiring (STR scan results + property facts)
user_visible_behavior: bun run run-address --evidence-file <json> feeds STR scan results and property facts to the packets that can reason with them; with no --evidence-file the engine runs blind exactly as before.
verification: bun run verify; test/external_evidence_exposure.test.ts (the critical negative test); test/prose_external_evidence.test.ts (scrubber survival); test/e2e E2E-3 (parity guard) + E2E-4 (enriched); env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY bun test test/e2e; OE_PROSE_REDACT=1 bun run verify.
evidence: OE_PROSE_REDACT=off OE_PROSE_REGISTER=off bun run verify: typecheck clean, lint 0 errors (3 pre-existing warnings), 132 pass / 0 fail / 556 expect() across 23 files (baseline before this work: 56 pass / 0 fail). bun run e2e: 4 pass / 0 fail (E2E-1..E2E-4). env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u OPENAI_API_KEY bun test test/e2e with .env moved aside then restored byte-identical: 4 pass / 0 fail (no key, no network). UNDER THE EXPERIMENT FLAGS after the glossary scope fix (b0e3ef8): OE_PROSE_REGISTER=on -> 131 pass / 1 fail; both flags on (the local .env default) -> 130 pass / 2 fail. Those 1-2 residual failures are TAUTOLOGICAL - 'proseRedactEnabled > is off by default' and '_prose_register_lines > is empty by default (flag off)' assert the flags are off, so enabling a flag breaks them by construction. Both predate this work. ZERO real failures in every config. BOTH ACCEPTANCE GUARDS OBSERVED FAILING BEFORE BEING TRUSTED: adding str_scan to owner_identity_and_mailing broke the critical negative test on all 3 fronts (solo/compact, solo/full, production bucket union) plus packets_exposure_map; making rental_market_summary_lines(null) return ['probe'] broke E2E-3. Both reverted, green after.
notes: Contract in src/agents/external_evidence.ts; exposure map locked by test/packets_exposure_map.test.ts. str_scan/property_facts deliberately NOT in SUBSTANTIVE_SOURCES. evidence_map.property_types stays EMPTY on purpose - it feeds _has_portfolio_hint, a SCORING gate; the type reaches prompts via ResolvedAddressContext only. TWO REAL DEFECTS THIS WORK FOUND AND FIXED, both of which would have shipped green while silently gutting the feature: (1) the prose scrubber ate 'for_rent' via SNAKE_RE - fixed through commit 6a885ba's existing CONTROLLED_VOCABULARY set, no second mechanism; vrbo/realtor survived naturally as bare lowercase words. (2) buildProseRegisterLines rendered the glossary UNSCOPED into every prompt, broadcasting the str_scan/property_facts tokens to owner_identity_and_mailing whenever OE_PROSE_REGISTER is on - which the local .env makes the default dev environment. Same bug class as the full-profile hole: a channel ignoring scope. Fixed in b0e3ef8 by gating ONLY the external sources on the packet's own scope (or the bucket's union), leaving graph-source entries unconditional so the in-flight register A/B is not perturbed. Only vocabulary ever leaked, never evidence content - the selective-exposure design held. KNOWN CONSEQUENCES (decisions of record, not bugs): input_sources is static so exposed packets name str_scan in 'Context scope' lines even blind (no evidence content leaks; E2E-3 asserts it); the BUCKET is the unit of exposure via _union_source_scope, so owner_identity sees property_facts and legal_address_presence sees str_scan through bucket-mates - the collapse-critical exclusions survive and are asserted at both levels. NOT DONE HERE: the live full-stack run + blind control (needs the backend passing --evidence-file, a graph service and an LLM). Until then this branch's path is dormant - external_evidence defaults null - which is why the parity guard makes it safe to merge first.
